case_title: KONG DON LEE VS. JUN MENG LI

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-09-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-09-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF KONG DON LEE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JUN MENG LI IS PRESENT AND IS ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPERTER REBECCA CHAU. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,531.65 FILED BY LEE, KONG DON AS TO DEFENDANT LI, JUN MENG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-11-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$85.00) SERVED DEC-06-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LI, JUN MENG

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-11-2022 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO FEB-09-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KONG DON LEE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JUN MENG LI IS PRESENT. PLIAINTIFF ASSISTED THE COURT CLERK WITH INFORMING DEFENDANT THAT A CONTINAUNCE WAS NEEDED DUE TO NOT HAVING AN AVAILABLE CANTONESE INTERPERTER FOR TODAY'S PROCEEDINGS. PLAINTIFF INFORMS DEFENDANT IN CANTONESE THAT THE NEW DATE IS TO BE FEBRUARY 9, 2022 AT 1:30 PM JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE TO ALLOW FOR A CANTONESE INTERPERTER FOR DEFENDANT JUN MENG LI. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-09-2022 - JUDGMENT. (PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON FEBRUARY 9, 2022)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, KONG DON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LI, JUN MENG $2,531.65 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,666.65, THE COURT FINDS THE DEFENDANTTO BE 100% AT FAULT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
